$ cd ~/projekte/zextract-stress-test

    |
140 |         let matches = self.matches.clone();

    |                     ------- value moved here

        m = extract("error at src/main.rs:42:8 here")
        assert len(m) == 1

Python 3.11.7 (main, Dec 15 2023, 18:12:31) on darwin
>>> from extractor import Picker
>>> p = Picker("realworld.txt")
>>> len(p.matches)
42
>>> p.matches[0]
<Match url 'https://example.com/install.sh'>
>>> p.json()
[{"type":"url","raw":"https://example.com/install.sh","scheme":"https"}]
>>> exit()
